sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40926" key="e)pispei=n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισπεῖν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισπών</orth>, <sense id="n40926.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐφέπω</ref> </xr> (A).</sense> </entryFree>
